nasb.text: You shall say to him, ‘The Lord, the God of the Hebrews, sent me to you, saying, “Let My people go, that they may serve Me in the wilderness. But behold, you have not listened until now.”

esv.text: And you shall say to him, ‘The Lord, the God of the Hebrews, sent me to you, saying, “Let my people go, that they may serve me in the wilderness.” But so far, you have not obeyed.

cnv.text: 你要對法老說：‘耶和華希伯來人的　神差我到你這裡來，說：“讓我的人民離開這裡，好使他們可以在曠野事奉我”，你看，直到現在你還是不聽。

ccb.text: 你要对他说，‘希伯来人的上帝耶和华差遣我来告诉你，要让祂的子民到旷野去事奉祂，但到如今你还是不肯。
